title: chamaecytisus spinescens subsp. spinescens
intro: Chamaecytisus spinescens subsp. spinescens, also known as the spiny broom or broom genist, is a plant species in the pea family that is native to southern Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The spinescens subsp. spinescens has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits of soothing inflammation and promoting relaxation. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and processing the plant's flowers, leaves, and stems.
